bot_core_gate_snippet: logger.debug("LOCAL MLB ORIGINATION DISABLED slug=%s reason=model_authority_enforced", market.slug)
evidence.launch_startup_snippet_summary: launch_all.py starts bot_core.py through the normal launcher path and does not set ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION itself in the inspected startup flow.
evidence.env_search_result: No ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION setting was found in sports_bot_v2 .env or elsewhere under sports_bot_v2 except the bot_core.py gate definition.
bridge_only_entry_path_proof: bot_core.py still contains the bridge branch using get_approved_intents(open_slugs)
bridge branch still constructs Signal from model intent and executes through open_position(...) and insert_open_trade(...)
with local origination gated off by default, bridge/model-issued recommendations are the only remaining production open path
evidence.non_mlb_side_effect_assessment: The gate variable is MLB-specific by intent and sits in bot_core production trade-origination flow. In this workspace the active production sport is baseball. No separate non-MLB startup path was found to be unintentionally changed by the default-off gate in the current production configuration.
